Package recoder.java.expression.operator

package recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions. New is also considered an operator (TypeOperator).
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    recoder.java.expression
    Elements of the Java syntax tree representing expressions.
    recoder.java.expression.literal
    This package contains representations for the various Java literal types.
